phases.name: Phase 1: Foundation
phases.description: Data models and configuration -- no interdependencies between these two tasks

phases.name: Phase 2: Core components
phases.description: Validators, prompt builder, scorer, and API client that depend only on Phase 1 outputs (models, config). All 5 tasks are independent of each other.

phases.name: Phase 3: Coherence validator and I/O
phases.description: Coherence validator depends on prompt builder (04) and API client (08) from Phase 2. I/O layer depends only on Phase 1 models.

phases.name: Phase 4: Integration
phases.description: Orchestrator, entry point, and tests depend on all previous components

phases.name: Phase 5: Testing
phases.description: Integration tests depend on all components being implemented
